privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Thank you for using On The Line. This Privacy Policy explains how information may be collected, used, and disclosed when you use the application.
privacy.collect.title: Information We Collect
privacy.collect.body1: We do not collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, or address.
privacy.collect.body2: However, the app may collect certain information automatically through third-party services used within the app.
privacy.collect.ads.title: Advertising Data
privacy.collect.ads.body: Our app uses Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect certain information to provide and improve advertising services, including:
privacy.collect.ads.item1: Device identifiers (such as the advertising identifier / IDFA)
privacy.collect.ads.footer: This data may be used to provide personalized or non-personalized ads depending on your device settings and permissions.
privacy.collect.diag.title: App Diagnostics and Performance Data
privacy.collect.diag.body: We may collect anonymous technical information to improve the app's stability and performance, including:
privacy.collect.diag.item3: Device type and operating system version
privacy.collect.diag.footer: This information is not used to identify individual users.
privacy.tracking.title: App Tracking Transparency (iOS)
privacy.tracking.body1: On iOS devices, the app may request permission to track your activity across apps and websites owned by other companies using Apple's App Tracking Transparency framework.
privacy.tracking.body2: If you choose not to allow tracking, the app will still function normally, but ads may be less relevant.
privacy.thirdparty.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdparty.body1: The app uses third-party services that may collect information used to identify you.
privacy.thirdparty.body3: For more information, please review Google's privacy policy:
privacy.children.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.children.body: The app does not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children. If you believe that a child has provided personal information through the app, please contact us and we will promptly remove such information.
privacy.changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacy.changes.body: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacy.contact.title: Contact Us
privacy.contact.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you may contact us at:
support.title: Support
support.subtitle: How can we help you?
support.welcome: Welcome to the On The Line support page.
support.contact.title: Contact Us
support.contact.body: Having trouble? Send us an email with your name, email address, a description of the issue, and optionally your app version and device info.
support.contact.intro: If you encounter any problems while playing or have questions, please send an email to:
support.contact.info.title: Please include:
support.contact.info.name: Name
support.contact.response: We will respond as soon as possible.
support.howto.title: How to Play
support.howto.goal: The goal of the game is simple: connect objects and clear them to score points.
support.howto.rules.title: Basic Rules
support.howto.rule1: Connect 5 or more identical objects in a horizontal, vertical, or diagonal line to clear them.
support.howto.rule2: Each time you move an object, 3 new random objects appear on the board.
support.howto.rule3: If objects are cleared during a move, no new objects will appear for that move.
support.howto.rule4: Objects cannot move through paths blocked by other objects.
support.howto.rule5: If there is no space left to place new random objects, the game ends.
support.howto.undo.title: Undo Move
support.howto.undo.body: If you make a mistake, you can undo your last move.
support.howto.undo.how: Tap the back arrow at the top-left corner and watch a rewarded ad to undo your previous action.
support.scoring.title: Scoring System
support.scoring.intro: When objects are cleared, the score depends on how many objects are connected.
support.scoring.formula.label: If n objects are cleared:
support.combo.title: Combo System
support.combo.intro: When objects are cleared in consecutive moves, a combo multiplier is applied.
support.combo.formula.label: Combo multiplier formula:
support.lucky.title: Lucky Clear 🍀
support.lucky.intro: Sometimes the 3 randomly spawned objects may accidentally form a line and clear automatically.
support.examples.title: Score Examples
support.examples.ex1.title: Basic Clear
support.examples.ex2.title: Bigger Line
support.examples.ex3.title: Combo Clear
support.examples.ex4.title: Big Combo
support.gameover.title: Game Over
support.gameover.item3: But there is no empty space left on the board
support.gameover.end: When that happens, the game is over.
support.protip.title: Pro Tip
support.protip.body: Clearing larger lines and chaining combos is the fastest way to achieve high scores.
support.outro.title: Now it's your turn
